languages.text: "Согласно установленным точкам отсчета, если мирянин фиксирует в пространстве явления, не фиксируемые никем более, ему надлежит триангулировать разметку данных и сохранить свой позор в тайне".

traits.locale_text: "Согласно установленным точкам отсчета, если мирянин фиксирует в пространстве явления, не фиксируемые никем более, ему надлежит триангулировать разметку данных и сохранить свой позор в тайне".

languages.text: "If a layperson perceives phenomena in their spatial environment, and these phenomena are not detectable by any other observer, then that layperson is required to triangulate the observed data according to established reference points, and preserve his shame in silence."
languages.original_text: "Согласно установленным точкам отсчета, если мирянин фиксирует в пространстве явления, не фиксируемые никем более, ему надлежит триангулировать разметку данных и сохранить свой позор в тайне".

traits.locale_text: "According to established reference points: should a layman perceive phenomena in the field, phenomena detectable by no other observer, he is required to triangulate the data-mapping and preserve his shame in silence."

"According to established reference points: should a layman perceive phenomena in the field, phenomena detectable by no other observer, he is required to triangulate the data-mapping and preserve his shame in silence."

"If a layperson perceives phenomena in their spatial environment, and these phenomena are not detectable by any other observer, then that layperson is required to triangulate the observed data according to established reference points, and preserve his shame in silence."

"If a layperson perceives phenomena in their spatial environment, and these phenomena are not detectable by any other observer, then that layperson is required to triangulate the observed data according to established reference points, and preserve his shame in silence."

languages.text: «Si un{mf||a} laic{mf|o|a} percibe fenómenos en su entorno espacial que otro observador no puede detectar, {mf|el|la} laic{mf|o|a} debe triangular los datos observados mediante los puntos de referencia establecidos y preservar en silencio su vergüenza».
languages.original_text: "If a layperson perceives phenomena in their spatial environment, and these phenomena are not detectable by any other observer, then that layperson is required to triangulate the observed data according to established reference points, and preserve his shame in silence."

traits.locale_text: «Si un{mf||a} laic{mf|o|a} percibe fenómenos en su entorno espacial que otro observador no puede detectar, {mf|el|la} laic{mf|o|a} debe triangular los datos observados mediante los puntos de referencia establecidos y preservar en silencio su vergüenza».

languages.text: “若一个教外人士在其周围空间感知到未被其他观察者侦测到的现象，则该教外人士应依据既定参照点，对观测到的数据进行三角测量，并在羞愧中保持缄默。”
languages.original_text: "If a layperson perceives phenomena in their spatial environment, and these phenomena are not detectable by any other observer, then that layperson is required to triangulate the observed data according to established reference points, and preserve his shame in silence."

traits.locale_text: “若一个教外人士在其周围空间感知到未被其他观察者侦测到的现象，则该教外人士应依据既定参照点，对观测到的数据进行三角测量，并在羞愧中保持缄默。”

languages.text: « Si un profane perçoit des phénomènes dans son environnement spatial et que lesdits phénomènes échappent aux autres observateurs, l'individu en question se doit de trianguler les données observées selon les points de référence établis et de supporter sa honte en silence. »
languages.original_text: "If a layperson perceives phenomena in their spatial environment, and these phenomena are not detectable by any other observer, then that layperson is required to triangulate the observed data according to established reference points, and preserve his shame in silence."

traits.locale_text: « Si un profane perçoit des phénomènes dans son environnement spatial et que lesdits phénomènes échappent aux autres observateurs, l'individu en question se doit de trianguler les données observées selon les points de référence établis et de supporter sa honte en silence. »

languages.text: "Eğer avamdan biri mekânsal çevresinde başka hiçbir gözlemci tarafından tespit edilemeyen fenomenler algılarsa bu kişinin gözlemlenen verilerin yerleşik referans noktalarına göre nirengisini alması ve utancını sessizce saklaması gerekir."
languages.original_text: "If a layperson perceives phenomena in their spatial environment, and these phenomena are not detectable by any other observer, then that layperson is required to triangulate the observed data according to established reference points, and preserve his shame in silence."

traits.locale_text: "Eğer avamdan biri mekânsal çevresinde başka hiçbir gözlemci tarafından tespit edilemeyen fenomenler algılarsa bu kişinin gözlemlenen verilerin yerleşik referans noktalarına göre nirengisini alması ve utancını sessizce saklaması gerekir."

languages.text: 「一般人が空間環境における現象を感知し、その現象は他の観察者によって検出できない場合、その一般人は確立された基準点に従って観測データを三角測量し、その恥を沈黙で守る」
languages.original_text: "If a layperson perceives phenomena in their spatial environment, and these phenomena are not detectable by any other observer, then that layperson is required to triangulate the observed data according to established reference points, and preserve his shame in silence."

traits.locale_text: 「一般人が空間環境における現象を感知し、その現象は他の観察者によって検出できない場合、その一般人は確立された基準点に従って観測データを三角測量し、その恥を沈黙で守る」

languages.text: "Wenn ein Laie in seiner räumlichen Umgebung Phänomene wahrnimmt und diese Phänomene für andere Beobachter nicht erkennbar sind, muss besagter Laie die beobachteten Daten basierend auf vorgegebenen Referenzpunkten triangulieren und seine Scham schweigend erdulden."
languages.original_text: "If a layperson perceives phenomena in their spatial environment, and these phenomena are not detectable by any other observer, then that layperson is required to triangulate the observed data according to established reference points, and preserve his shame in silence."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn ein Laie in seiner räumlichen Umgebung Phänomene wahrnimmt und diese Phänomene für andere Beobachter nicht erkennbar sind, muss besagter Laie die beobachteten Daten basierend auf vorgegebenen Referenzpunkten triangulieren und seine Scham schweigend erdulden."
